must.title: Tooltip container has tooltip role
must.description: The popup element that contains the tooltip text must have role="tooltip"

must.title: Trigger references tooltip via aria-describedby
must.description: The element that triggers the tooltip must have aria-describedby pointing to the tooltip's id

must.title: Escape key dismisses tooltip
must.description: Pressing Escape must close the tooltip without moving focus

should.title: Tooltip appears on focus
should.description: Tooltip should be shown when the trigger element receives keyboard focus, not only on hover

should.title: Tooltip content must not be focusable
should.description: Tooltips must not contain interactive elements. Use a non-modal dialog for focusable hover content

should.title: Tooltip stays open when hovering over it
should.description: Per WCAG 1.4.13, once shown the tooltip should remain visible when the pointer moves over the tooltip itself

should.title: Short delay before showing
should.description: Add a small delay (300–500ms) before showing to avoid accidental triggers while the user moves the mouse

avoid.title: Interactive elements inside tooltip
avoid.description: Don't put buttons, links or form controls inside a tooltip — use a dialog pattern instead

avoid.title: Relying on HTML title attribute
avoid.description: Don't use the title attribute as the sole tooltip mechanism — it is not keyboard accessible and behaves inconsistently across screen readers

react.label: React Tooltip

html.label: HTML Tooltip
html.code: Saves your current progress

tests.title: WCAG 1.4.13 Hoverable
steps: Hover over trigger to show tooltip
Move mouse onto the tooltip itself

tests.title: Screen Reader Description
steps: Verify screen reader reads the tooltip text as a description
